jd_text: Title: Cybersecurity GRC Consultant Location: Riyadh, Saudi Arabia Contract: 12 months (with potential extension) Overview We are partnering with a Big 4 firm supporting a government-led transformation initiative in Riyadh. We are looking for a Cybersecurity GRC Consultant to support governance, risk, and compliance activities across large-scale programs. Key Responsibilities Support development and implementation of cybersecurity policies and frameworks Conduct risk assessments and gap analysis against standards (ISO 27001, NCA, etc.) Assist in establishing governance structures and reporting mechanisms Support audit and compliance activities Work closely with stakeholders to ensure alignment with regulatory requirements Requirements 3–8 years of experience in cybersecurity GRC or risk management Familiarity with ISO 27001, NIST, or local Saudi frameworks (e.g. NCA) Experience in consulting, advisory, or large transformation programs Strong stakeholder management and documentation skills Additional preferences Certifications such as CISM, CISSP, ISO 27001 Lead Implementer/Auditor Experience working with government or semi-government entities Apply Now
